about.title: About
about.label: Get to know me
about.description:
I'm Bhonandh, a Network Admin at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino, where "five nines" of uptime is what the business expects, not what it hopes for. I build and keep alive the infrastructure behind revenue-critical systems

Networks don't fail quietly, and breaches don't announce themselves. Somewhere there's a rogue IoT device on a VLAN it has no business touching, a firewall rule that drifted out of policy, a service account with more access than anyone remembers granting. An outage or an attacker needs only one of those to be true. I assume one already is, and my job is to find it before anyone else notices. Most days, they don't.

Underneath the war stories: enterprise LAN/WAN, wireless, Cisco, Aruba, Palo Alto, and network automation in Python, backed by a Master's in Computer Science and a CCNA I treated as a checkpoint, not a finish line.

What I'm chasing next: deeper cloud-native networking, infrastructure-as-code at scale, and the problems that don't have a Cisco TAC article yet. The ones where you open Wireshark at midnight and start asking better questions.

Most people only think about the network when it stops. My job is to make sure they never have to. If you're building something that has to work, and work quietly, let's talk.

highlights.sub: Cisco validated expertise in enterprise core routing, high-density switching, and VLAN infrastructure.

highlights.title: Network Security & Edge
highlights.sub: Deploying Palo Alto Firewalls, Cisco ASA, advanced ACL enforcement, and proactive threat isolation.

highlights.title: Automation & Telemetry
highlights.sub: Building Python firmware pipelines alongside proactive scale monitoring using SolarWinds and Syslog.

items.company: Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino, Tampa, FL
items.title: Network Engineer
description: Design and operate Cisco Catalyst/ISR LAN/WAN infrastructure across a high-density, multi-floor campus, managing IDF/MDF/data center Layer 2/3 segments, VLAN architecture, VTP, QoS policies, and fiber backhaul to maintain 99.99% uptime for mission-critical revenue operations.

Monitor and support security operations using SolarWinds and Syslog telemetry for proactive monitoring, log analysis, and vulnerability management. Leverage automation to improve threat isolation efficiency by 40%.

items.company: The Children's Museum of Indianapolis, Indianapolis, IN
items.title: Network Administrator Intern
description: Perform proactive troubleshooting and root cause analysis for network performance and connectivity issues, utilizing Wireshark packet captures, tcpdump, and switch logs to isolate communication anomalies during live production migrations.
Executed a multi-vendor Cisco-to-Aruba switching migration, validating 802.1Q trunking, LACP, and end-to-end Layer 3 connectivity for a zero-downtime cutover with full topology documentation.

items.company: Indiana State University, Terre Haute, IN
items.title: Graduate Assistant
description: Handled network and connectivity tickets for students, faculty, and campus operations through the campus ITSM queue under SLA driven response timelines.
Monitored OSPF routing stability, link utilization, and enterprise network health for 10,000+ concurrent users using SNMP and Syslog telemetry, preempting routing anomalies before user impact.

items.company: Indiana State University, Terre Haute, IN
items.title: Master of Science in Computer Science
description: Completed advanced graduate coursework and projects in core computer science domains including Cloud Computing, Cybersecurity, Data Science, Operating, and Computer Networks.
Developed and implemented real-time data-driven and dashboards, focusing on scalable architecture, secure system design, and distributed computing principles.
Engineered secure network access solutions and explored enterprise-level VPN architectures, emphasizing secure communication, authentication, and system reliability.
Worked on applied machine learning and analytics projects involving data processing, visualization, and performance optimization for real-world problem-solving.

items.title: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering with Specialization in Big Data Analytics
description: Built a strong foundation in Computer Science with specialization in Big Data Analytics, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Cybersecurity, and Cloud Computing, focusing on scalable and intelligent design.
Developed AI/ML based solutions for predictive analytics, classification, and pattern recognition using structured and unstructured datasets, applying supervised and unsupervised learning techniques.
Gained hands on experience in cybersecurity fundamentals including secure system design, encryption techniques, network security principles, and vulnerability assessment methodologies.
Worked on cloud based deployments and architecture models emphasizing scalability, fault tolerance, and high availability using modern cloud computing concepts.
Completed capstone and academic projects integrating AI/ML models with big data platforms for intelligent decision making and automation use cases.

items.title: Automated Network Configuration Drift & Compliance Engine
items.description: An immutable NetDevOps state-validation platform engineered to proactively audit, detect, and alert on unauthorized configuration drift across distributed multi-vendor enterprise infrastructure. Operating as a programmatic compliance pipeline, the orchestration engine leverages Python and Netmiko to execute highly secure, parallelized SSH sessions across 20+ live production devices. Running configurations are ingested dynamically and parsed against Git-tracked 'golden baselines' utilizing custom algorithmic diff logic. Detected policy deviations, unauthorized firewall alterations, or protocol discrepancies trigger an automated remediation workflow that aggregates structured, color-coded cryptographic delta reports, dispatching telemetry warnings via secure SMTP endpoints. This closed-loop audit framework successfully eliminated manual validation overhead by 80%, establishing a continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) governance standard for network infrastructure safety.

images.alt: Automated compliance dashboard highlighting multi-vendor configuration status and detected deltas

items.title: Development Of Smart Energy Meter Using IOT
items.description: Peer-reviewed and published research architecture engineering a high-reliability, edge-to-cloud IoT telemetry network optimized for real-time power consumption metrics across distributed industrial nodes. Published in the ICCS proceedings via SSRN and Elsevier, the system focuses on maintaining network survivability, packet delivery assurance, and data integrity over volatile wireless backhauls. The edge tier captures granular voltage, current, and load metrics, packaging data packets into a highly optimized payload layer. Data routing is governed by an asynchronous MQTT pub/sub broker mesh to minimize link overhead and bandwidth strain. Ingestion pipes feed real-time cloud data pipelines, driving low-latency operational dashboards capable of executing remote network controls, isolation protocols, and load-shedding commands across endpoints based on dynamic power grid conditions.

images.alt: Architectural topology diagram mapping MQTT broker bridging edge telemetry nodes to cloud databases
